description_long: This object is a wooden treasure chest with a domed lid, reinforced by wide metal bands adorned with rivets. The wood panels are weathered, giving it a rustic and aged appearance, while the metal bands provide structural strength and a decorative touch. The front of the chest features a prominent octagonal metal frame and a keyhole, suggesting it can be locked for security. The lid is partially open, revealing a dark interior that may contain valuables or storage space. The hinges and rivets are clearly visible, emphasizing its robust construction. This chest would be commonly found in urban settings as a decorative or functional storage item, possibly in parks, themed shops, or as a prop in public spaces.
description: A weathered wooden treasure chest with metal bands, rivets, and a domed lid, partially open to reveal a dark interior. Features include a keyhole and octagonal metal frame on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal metal frame and partially open domed lid.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wood grain, metal bands, and visible keyhole.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but without the keyhole, showing the domed lid and metal reinforcement.
description_view_3: Front angled view with the lid open, clearly displaying the keyhole and dark interior.
